**Review of Attorney Carlos Lopez and Firm**

Hiring Queenan Law Firm and being represented by Mr. Carlos Lopez was one of the most disappointing legal experiences I’ve ever had. Not only was I charged the 33.33% contingency fee stated in the contract, but he also added an additional **$3,457.34 in “other fees”**—after previously telling me it would only be $2,300 before I agreed to settle; mind you that it is not even us going to trial.

On top of that, Mr. Lopez got me into settling by telling me that if I went to trial, the other party would uncover my past workers’ compensation during discovery and that I would likely receive less money. I now see this as a tactic to push me into a settlement I was not comfortable with.

He also gave me **inconsistent and misleading information** about the at-fault party’s insurance policy. At first, Mr. Lopez told me the other party carried a **$100,000 policy limit**, but later he changed his story, saying he wasn’t sure and that it might only be **$50,000**. This kind of back-and-forth left me feeling like he was not being honest or simply not competent.

Throughout the process, I felt misled, mistreated, and at times like I was dealing with an **inexperienced intern rather than a licensed attorney.** Lies, miscommunication, and broken promises defined my entire experience. I even reached a point where I just wanted him off my case completely.

Because of this conduct, I will be filing a **formal complaint with the Texas State Bar** against Mr. Lopez. What he did was not right, and no client should ever have to go through what I experienced.

**DO NOT trust this firm with your case, and especially do not trust Mr. Carlos Lopez.** He did me wrong, and I would never recommend his services to anyone.

You could not find more capable and caring attorneys! Kevin Queenan, Carlos Lopez, and the rest of the team leave no stone unturned in their meticulous preparation, investigating every possible angle to secure outcomes that consistently exceed expectations. I would highly recommend them.

I highly recommend these lawyers; they helped me get some tickets dismissed. They were always attentive, explained everything clearly, and gave me peace of mind throughout the process. Their professionalism and speed surprised me compared to other lawyers. I definitely recommend them to anyone looking for help to clear tickets from their record.

First off I want to thank Mr Olegario Estrada and his whole team for helping me stay free and raise my 2 boys. Let me explain to you why I would highly recommend Estrada law Office. I was charged with an aggravated robbery when I was 17 years old, I immediately contacted Estrada law office. I remember feeling nervous and anxious every time going to court, but watching the way Olegario moves at work helped me be at ease. Everybody knew him, prosecutors, judges, other attorneys. Nobody else was recognized like he was. Anyways I watched peers my age get the same charge and they got sentenced to 10 yrs, 25 yrs, 40yrs. He helped me get probation 5 years deferred, that’s the same amount of time they gave to 2 defendants who “snitched” or were on a state witness list, that is also the least amount of time u can get for a aggravated robbery. I can’t even put in words what I felt when they gave me 5years deferred probation instead of sending me to prison, I got another chance at life. 3 years into my probation I was a passenger  in a vehicle that got pulled over, they found marijuana and a prohibited weapon (switch glock), my probation got violated. The gun was not mine but they still took me to jail and charged me with it. Prosecutor wanted me to do 15 years, prosecutor wouldn’t budge and that’s what he wanted me to do, 15 years for a gun that’s not mine. Over a year and all the attorney could say today when I finally spoke to them is they were able to get the at fault drivers policy maxed at 30k. The same update I received via text Oct 30th. When I asked why their receptionist told me there was a note they had been reaching out to my insurance for under insured motorist coverage he acted as if he did not even know about that note and told me he was going to get back to me in a few hours. So they don’t even fully know who’s giving what details in their office. Ironically majority of their suit fees medical bills and the loan I took last year would probably eat whatever I do get completely they all seem to work with each other. Since Oct when I spoke with them and signed release for my check they’re still going in requesting reductions. If you’re looking for a firm that will aggressively work to try to get you every dime for the wait and inconvenience to your life this probably isn’t the best. I would rather them state it’s not something they know how to do than to gaslight someone like they aren’t aware.  This case should not take this long it’s incredibly frustrating.

I have been waiting for simple requests to be fulfilled since December 17th. I’ve been bounced around between people, and now, no one will even respond to me. Being 'pawned off' to a firm that clearly doesn't have the capacity or professional courtesy to communicate is incredibly frustrating.

Avoid this firm if you expect accountability.
